steps.content: Parts are the basic building blocks in Roblox. You can create them, move them, and change their properties.

steps.instruction: Create a part and set its size and position:
steps.starterCode:
-- Create a new part
-- Set its size to (4, 1, 2)
-- Set its position to (0, 10, 0)
-- Print confirmation
steps.solution:
local part = Instance.new("Part")
part.Size = Vector3.new(4, 1, 2)
part.Position = Vector3.new(0, 10, 0)
part.Parent = workspace
print("Part created successfully!")
steps.hint: Use Instance.new("Part") to create a new part

steps.instruction: Change the part's color to red:
steps.starterCode:
-- Change the part's color to red
-- Print confirmation
steps.solution:
part.Color = Color3.fromRGB(255, 0, 0)
print("Part color changed to red!")
steps.hint: Use Color3.fromRGB(red, green, blue) to set colors
